titleStmt.title: SII 36.245: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 245. (A.R. No. 245 of 1910.) NARASIṄGAPURAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the Nāchchiyār shrine in the Narasimha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: This inscription is connected with the previous one (No. 244). Records the consecration of the images of Perumāḷ, Pirāṭṭi and Iḷaiyāḻvār by Paṇṇan alias Tāḻi Chūṟaiyān Cīrāmadūtan of Kiḍāraṅkoṇḍachōḻapuram in Pāsāli-nāḍu, a subdivision of Maṇayiṟ-kōṭṭam and a gift for providing sacred food and two lamps to the deities.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ikkoyilil perumāḷaiyum pirāṭṭiyāraiyum Iḷaiyāḻvāraiyum Eḻuntaruḷuvittu Ivarkaḷukku tiruvamutupaṭiyum tirununtā
viḷakkiraṇṭum vaittu Ittanmam can=tirātittavarai celvatākac ceyvitten maṇayiṟ koṭṭattup pācāli nāṭṭu kiṭāraṅ
koṇṭacoḻapurattil vāṇiyar paṇṇanāna tāḻicūṟaiyān cirāmatūtanen Ittanmam Aḻiyāmai kāppān śrīpātaṅkaḷ
Entalai melina §§
Digital edition of SII 36.245 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
